[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10000111 4
1 11100001 4
2 00011110 4
3 10101110 5
4 11101110 6
5 11111100 6
6 11010111 6
7 11100011 5

12 21 01110100 4
23 32 11010100 4

45 54 01000000 1
56 65 00010010 2
67 76 00101011 4
70 07 00110100 3

13 31 10100000 2
24 42 10110011 5
35 53 00100111 4

57 75 00111001 4
60 06 00011111 5
71 17 10111110 6

47 74 01111001 5
50 05 00001101 3
61 16 10010101 4
72 27 11001010 4

26 62 11100001 4 match 1
37 73 00011110 4 match 2
